qc_feedback: [Non-Fail - Up to 15% Moderate Errors] [Missing Criteria Outcome] - There is no rubric criterion checking for this part in the prompt, "and whether each has a matching bill," that's related to the Mercor lock extension records [Overlapping or Redundant Criteria] - C14 and C26 have a partial overlap, as if the response provided wrong amounts; both will fail, while C26's main concern should be just the dates associated with the amounts.
